_schema.description: Range dataset. Each item has a min and max — the span chart draws a floating bar between them. Zero is not the baseline. Items are sorted by midpoint descending by default.

fields.title: string — chart headline
fields.xDomain: [number, number] — explicit x-axis extent (do not truncate; choose a range that gives context to the floating bars)
fields.referenceLines[].value: number — x-axis position of a vertical reference marker
fields.referenceLines[].label: string — annotation text for the reference line
fields.items[].label: string — category label (displayed on y-axis)
fields.items[].min: number — lower bound of the range
fields.items[].max: number — upper bound of the range

_schema.replace: Swap items[] with your categories. Provide min and max for each. Adjust xDomain to fit your scale. Add referenceLines[] entries for meaningful thresholds.

title: AI Benchmark Score Range by Humanitarian Task Domain
unit: Benchmark score across 12 leading AI models (0 – 100)
